epigraph.quote: Richard + Mary had been counting apples for 2 or 3 days (almost grounds for divorce.)

per_stop.quote: Eve made rag dolls with Nina, Backgammon with Seb, sewed a draw string bag with Joseph.
Counting apples. 2 lights + screens, 2 cameras. Each camera takes 17 pics per second, 2 miles per hour, every 5th row. At night.
He had left the buggy (cheeky) in the campsite with us overnight
